chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4586 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.21186/2023. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.19. 3. For orders on Misc. No.21187/2023. 4. For orders on Misc. No.21188/2023. 5. For hearing of main case. 25.09.2023. Mr. Raghib Ibrahim Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner professes to be a Member of the Sindh Outdoor Advertisement Association (Respondent No.4) and has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking to impugn an election announcement made by that Association. The case of the Petitioner is that the election is being held contrary to the Articles of Association/Bye-Laws and that the process is required to be supervised by the Provincial Assistant Registrar, Joint Stock Companies. Be that as it may, a perusal of the impugned announcement reflects that the elections were scheduled to be held on 20.09.2023, and on query posed learned counsel conceded that the same had taken place. Furthermore, there is nothing on record to show that the Petitioner has even approached the Registrar in the matter. Even otherwise, the dispute, if any, essentially appears to relate to an internal matter of a private association, which could at best form the subject of a civil proceeding, but does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ. As such, while granting the application for urgency, we accordingly dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
